PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator (Petitioner). Scott Bassin for Joesph Heaney (Petitioner).

Mr. Ferdon stated that the Public Administrator recognizes that the Family has priorty, and that they are not opposing the Family's petition but that they can not step aside until the Family gets appointed. Mr. Ferdon also expressed concern about the length of time it is taking for the Family to get appointed, notice to the Creditors and the need for the property to be attended to. The Court waived the defect in notice and granted Mr. Heaney's Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $1,303,000.00. The Public Administrator's petition is denied.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Denied

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Continued To Dec-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Bassin for Joseph Heaney (Petitioner). Thomas Cain for Dennis dunn.

The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to December 5, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Bassin to file an amended petition wrapping in all of the amendments (reflecting correct date of death as well as other changes), and for Mr. Bassin to republish and re-notice the matter.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Continued To Dec-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
